goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: This is a product contract defect. Under Zod 4, isoDate.default('') bypasses the transform, so omitted useByDate persists as an empty string. Availability uses useByDate ?? bestBeforeDate, causing the empty sentinel to mask a valid best-before date. Normalize omitted dates to null and defensively select the first non-empty use-by/best-before value without changing precedence or implying food safety.

worker_package.objective: Fix omitted Pantry ISO-date normalization and defensive availability expiry projection, add focused unit/integration persistence-to-recipe-availability regressions, preserve the accepted E2E unchanged, then complete every remaining isolated browser/full/build/database/integrity gate.
verify: Prove omitted dates normalize to null and supplied best-before remains 2027-04-02.
Prove batch persistence and recipe matchingBatches expose expiryDate 2027-04-02.
Run scoped format/lint and focused unit/integration tests.
Prepare isolated mirror and prove hashes; run complete unchanged 390/768/1280 Playwright evidence.
Run full tests/lint/typecheck/OpenAPI and isolated build.
Run disposable migrations/db check, release port, and prove diff/status/protected hashes.
stop_if: Use-by precedence or safety meaning would change.
Any grocery/cooking/inventory-management/Nutrition/docs or outside file is required.
E2E protected hash differs or verification would touch shared/live/secret/normal data.

evidence: The E2E posts bestBeforeDate 2027-04-02 and receives 201.
Zod 4 default bypasses the isoDate transform, retaining an empty omitted useByDate.
Persistence writes both parsed values directly and availability nullish-coalesces the empty use-by value ahead of best-before.
Both browser attempts failed identically with no expiry recorded.

parallel_safety.rationale: Normalization, projection, regression, and isolated verification are one serial contract repair.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
